title: Extract Container Logs
description:
## Extract Pod Logs

A pod named `log-generator` is running and emitting log lines every second.

**Your task:**

Use `kubectl logs` to inspect the logs and confirm that the message `ERROR: Database connection failed` appears in the output.

> Tip: Use `kubectl logs log-generator | grep ERROR` to filter.

hints.title: View pod logs
hints.body: Use kubectl logs to stream the output of a running container.

hints.title: Filter logs
hints.body: Pipe kubectl logs into grep to find specific messages.

setup_commands.command: kubectl run log-generator --image=busybox:1.36 --command -- sh -c 'echo "ERROR: Database connection failed" && sleep 3600'

commands.description: Pod log-generator emits ERROR: Database connection failed
